platform/system.name: system
platform/system.description: Returns the system/OS name, such as 'Linux', 'Darwin', 'Java', 'Windows'. An empty string is returned if the value cannot be determined. On iOS and Android, this returns the user-facing OS name (i.e, 'iOS, 'iPadOS' or 'Android'). To obtain the kernel name ('Darwin' or 'Linux'), use os.uname().

platform/system_alias.name: system_alias
platform/system_alias.description: Returns (system, release, version) aliased to common marketing names used for some systems. It also does some reordering of the information in some cases where it would otherwise cause confusion.
